fieldValues.value: RFC-009 Change E: Define Blueprint.rootTypes as ExactTypeRef[]

Blueprint.rootTypes is formally defined as ExactTypeRef[] (both typeId and typeVersion required, per I-78). Completes the fully UUID-anchored chain: Blueprint.rootTypes -> DocumentView.rootTypeRefs -> Container.rootInstanceIds. Typed discovery: a DocumentView is a candidate for a Container when any rootTypeRefs entry matches any Blueprint.rootTypes entry. When match produces no candidates, fall back to DocumentViews with no rootTypeRefs. This is a structural compatibility check, not a provenance assertion. Introduces blueprint.json schema.

ExactTypeRef (required typeVersion) is consistent with the version-exact semantics required by DocumentView.rootTypeRefs and the version-exact Record type binding. Using optional TypeRef would make the Blueprint/DocumentView comparison ambiguous. Pre-RFC-009 Blueprints with optional typeVersion must migrate (SHOULD diagnostic + unresolvable entry rather than hard reject).
